narrative:
Sycamore C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,448 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
